title: eBay Growth: Promoted Listings & 72% Revenue Increase
summary: Rebuilt eBay store architecture, launched Promoted Listings campaigns, and refreshed 340+ listings to deliver sustained marketplace revenue growth.
challenge: eBay revenue had stagnated at £180K annually with poor listing visibility, outdated imagery, and no paid promotion strategy. Store conversion lagged behind Amazon by 40%, and seller defect rate was approaching warning thresholds.
strategy: Treated eBay as a dedicated reach channel with its own merchandising and promotion budget. Prioritised listing quality refresh, then layered Promoted Listings with ROAS targets per category before optimising store navigation and trust signals.
implementation: Refreshed 340+ listings with unified imagery, SEO-optimised titles, and item specifics
Launched eBay Promoted Listings with category-level ROAS targets and bid management
Restructured eBay Store categories for improved product discovery
Implemented competitive pricing rules aligned with Amazon anchor pricing
Built weekly eBay Seller Hub reporting tracking impressions, CTR, and conversion
